hooks.command: RTK_DIR="/Users/adamwolfe/aims-platform/rtk"; if [ ! -d "$RTK_DIR/.git" ]; then git clone https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk.git "$RTK_DIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf '{"systemMessage":"rtk-ai cloned to %s"}\n' "$RTK_DIR"; else git -C "$RTK_DIR" pull --ff-only >/dev/null 2>&1; SHA=$(git -C "$RTK_DIR" rev-parse --short HEAD); printf '{"systemMessage":"rtk-ai updated (%s)"}\n' "$SHA"; fi
